name: 4K HD Wide Angle Lens
description: Capture 2x more in every frame. Perfect for stunning landscapes, architecture, and group photos without distortion.

name: 25x Macro Precision Lens
description: Reveal the unseen world. Capture intricate details of nature, textures, and tiny objects with incredible clarity.

name: 180° Ultra-Wide Fisheye
description: Get the classic spherical look. Ideal for action sports, artistic portraits, and creative interior shots.

name: Cinematic Anamorphic Lens
description: The filmmaker's favorite. Creates a 2.4:1 widescreen aspect ratio with beautiful horizontal lens flares.

name: 2x Telephoto Portrait Lens
description: Get closer without losing quality. Delivers professional shallow depth-of-field and flattering perspective for portraits.
